message:
refactor(codegen): Add emitConst/emitFmtConst helpers to reduce boilerplate

Refactored 12 codegen module files to use consistent emitConst and
emitFmtConst helper functions, reducing verbose builder block patterns.

Files refactored:
- math_mod.zig: genRounding, genPerm, genIsNan/IsInf/IsFinite, genCopysign
- builtins_mod.zig: genFmt, sideEffect, genIsinstance, genSuper
- _bisect_mod.zig: genBisectLeft, genBisectRight, genInsort
- xml_mod.zig: genParse, genTostring, genSubElement
- textwrap_mod.zig: genWidth, genWrap, genFill
- secrets_mod.zig: emitNbytes, genTokenBytes/Hex/Urlsafe
- hmac_mod.zig: genNew, genDigest
- zipfile_mod.zig: genZipFile, genIsZipfile
- marshal_mod.zig: genDumps, genLoad
- array_mod.zig: genArray
- socket_mod.zig: already had helpers, verified
- time_mod.zig: already had helpers, verified

Total ~150 lines of boilerplate reduced.
